title: Cyathella otophylla
taxonomy: Cyathella otophylla is classified as a species of liverwort, a group of non-vascular plants that belong to the division Marchantiophyta. This division is further classified into the class Marchantiopsida. The class Marchantiopsida is divided into several orders, with the order Marchantiales being one of the most well-known. The order Marchantiales is characterized by the presence of leafy thalli and the absence of stomata. Cyathella otophylla is a member of the family Marchantiaceae, which includes several other species of liverworts.
